title: Augmenting Auditor Judgment in High-Stakes Financial Compliance
conference: Designed and deployed a hybrid AI system (classification model + LLM pipeline), working with legal auditors to align model outputs with expert judgment and compliance criteria.

title: Supporting Professional Reflection through Critical AI Feedback
conference: Led the end-to-end design and implementation of a Google Slides add-on to study how product managers (PMs) engage withcontext-aware AI feedback of varying tones and levels of assistance.

title: Aligning AI Agent Outputs with User Intent via Metacognitive Self-Adaptation
conference: Led the problem formulation, design, implementation, and evaluation of a metacognitive architecture integrating symbolic knowledge and LLMs to localize, correct, and explain agent errors based on user feedback.

title: VAL: Interactive Task Planning Interface
conference: Engineered an interactive planning interface for a neural-symbolic agent to mitigate the opacity and hallucination risks of pure LLM-based autonomous planning.

title: Sound Clouds: Participatory Music Generation
conference: Fine-tuned YOLO12n (98.3% accuracy). Conducted data collection, analysis, and visualization (N=35) on user interaction patterns.

title: Calibrating User Trust and Mitigating Overreliance Under LLM Inconsistency
conference: Designed a controlled online experiment (N=252) to empirically examine how LLM inconsistency affects perceived AI capacity and user comprehension.

title: Explainable Churn Prediction to Support Operational Decision-Making
conference: Developed an interpretable churn prediction model (XGBoost + SHAP) to support retention strategy and operational decision-making across business and service teams.

title: Real-Time Background Segmentation
conference: Architected and developed a real-time background segmentation model (PyTorch) using a lightweight backbone and dense connections, achieving 1.5× faster inference and 34% higher accuracy than the baseline.

title: LTE Network KPI Analysis
conference: Analyzed LTE eNB KPI data using PCA and Python to assess relationships among performance indicators.

title: FORECST: Online Hackathon Platform
conference: Led full-stack development (React.js, Firebase) of an online platform hosting virtual hackathons.

title: MYFIT: Clothing Size Recommendation App
conference: Built Android app in Java in a team of 3 for visualizing clothing sizes.

title: PINTOS: Operating System Implementation
conference: Implemented kernel threads, user programs, file system, and virtual memory in C on QEMU.
